svg.text: Conduct security assessments across AWS, Azure, and GCP services aligned with
NIST 800-53 and CIS Benchmarks, while reviewing misconfigurations, excessive
permissions, and management-plane risks across enterprise cloud environments.
U.S. Department of Health and Human Services, IHS Division
Performed threat and security event assessments across CrowdStrike, Cortex XDR,
ExtraHop, and Azure IAM Identity Center, while investigating Splunk risk-based
alerts and supporting vulnerability remediation and CSIRT response workflows.
Supported analysis of suspicious websites and external threats affecting members
and enterprise visibility, while conducting security and risk assessments aligned
Identified and patched 150+ vulnerabilities using CrowdStrike Falcon, implemented
Azure Active Directory security policies, and improved response workflows through
XSOAR while supporting AWS IAM-related security work.
Installed and maintained server switches, performed hardware troubleshooting,
and optimized IT infrastructure while resolving critical hardware issues and
contributing to reduced network latency and improved uptime.
